productDisplayName: Fila Men Notch White Sports Shoes
description: A light-weight sport shoe that can take on heavy-duty training with no fussy technical add-ons - fila Notch shoe is a great buy. The feather light feel while training is something you can't put a price on! UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlaysPadded tongueMesh innerCentral lace upsPadded footbedStiff support for the back footMidsoleUber lightweight rubber midsole OutsoleThree piece rubber with grooves and lugsShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
